prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Recurrent hypoglycemia symptoms with irregular meals (about once weekly).

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Normal
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Repaglinide 1mg three times daily; Insulin Glargine 20units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 62.1 kg; Height 171.2 cm; BMI 21.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 110/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.8%; 9 months ago 8.1%; 6 months ago 8.6%; 3 months ago 9.0%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 211mg/dL; 9 months ago 202mg/dL; 6 months ago 238mg/dL; 3 months ago 190mg/dL; current 228mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 61.7kg; 9 months ago 64.7kg; 6 months ago 59.7kg; 3 months ago 57.3kg; current 62.1kg), Height (12 months ago 171.2cm; 9 months ago 171.2cm; 6 months ago 171.2cm; 3 months ago 171.2cm; current 171.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 110mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 72mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 27U/L; 3 months ago 26U/L; current 29U/L), AST (12 months ago 13U/L; 9 months ago 7U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 10U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 43mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 40mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 107mg/g; 9 months ago 122mg/g; 6 months ago 136mg/g; 3 months ago 141mg/g; current 119mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 69mg/dL; 6 months ago 71mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 59mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 60mg/dL; 3 months ago 59mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 100mg/dL; 6 months ago 119mg/dL; 3 months ago 122mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 10.9g/dL; current 10.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.22 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
